ModelCardExportJobArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the model card export job.
ModelCardExportJobArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the model card export job.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[a-z\-]*:sagemaker:[a-z0-9\-]{9,16}:[0-9]{12}:model-card/[a-zA-Z0-9](-*[a-zA-Z0-9]){0,62}/export-job/[a-zA-Z0-9](-*[a-zA-Z0-9]){0,62}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ModelCardExportJobName.description: The name of the model card export job.
ModelCardExportJobName.markdownDescription:
The name of the model card export job.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 63  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9](-*[a-zA-Z0-9]){0,62}$  
Update requires: Replacement

ModelCardName.description: The name or Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the model card to export.
ModelCardName.markdownDescription:
The name or Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the model card to export.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 256  
Pattern: ^(arn:aws[a-z\-]*:sagemaker:[a-z0-9\-]*:[0-9]{12}:model-card/.*)?([a-zA-Z0-9](-*[a-zA-Z0-9]){0,62})$  
Update requires: Replacement

ModelCardVersion.description: The version of the model card to export. If a version is not provided, then the latest version of the model card is exported.
ModelCardVersion.markdownDescription:
The version of the model card to export. If a version is not provided, then the latest version of the model card is exported.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: Replacement

OutputConfig.description: The model card output configuration that specifies the Amazon S3 path for exporting.
OutputConfig.markdownDescription:
The model card output configuration that specifies the Amazon S3 path for exporting.

Required: Yes  
Type:   
Update requires: Replacement

Type: String  
Allowed Values: InProgress | Completed | Failed  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
